channel.title: Misc on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Misc on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Transcendance Scrolls
item.description:
When double-clicking a transcendence scroll you will be prompted by the gump above.

By clicking on any of the checkboxes you will immediately improve that skill. Be warned there is no confirmation box.

The higher the skill the less skill improvements you will get from a transcendence scroll.

Amount:

  • 0-49.9 = 20 skill points
  • 50-74.9 = 15 skill points
  • 75-89.9 = 10 skill points
  • 90-104.9 = 5 skill points
  • 105-119.9 = 2 skill points
  • 120-134.9 = 1 skill point
  • 135-144.9 = 0.5 skill point
  • 145 and up = 0.1 skill point

item.title: NPC & Boat Commands
item.description:
Merchants

Dragging a stable pet deed onto an animal trainer will give the pet back to you.

Command Information
Sell bag Will sell all the content of a targeted bag.
Sell all Will sell all the items on you that is of the same kind of the targeted item.
Sell Will bring up a sell gump that allows you to select what items you want to sell.
Buy Will bring up a buy menu that allows you to buy the selected items.
vendor train/merchant train Will bring up a skill training gump that allows you to train the selected skills to 33.3. Different vendors can train different skills.
identify This command only works on mages or scribes and allows you to identify items or full bags with items.
stable This command only works on animal trainers and will stable the selected pet.

Bankers

First time opening your bank for that character? Close the bank box and open it again to make sure your items won’t bug away, no items can be replaced by staff if this happens.
Command Information
bank Will open your bank box.
balance Shows the amount of gold you have in your bank.

High Priests

If you hand over less gold then asked for you will make the priest upset at you and you will have to donate gold to him before you can use his services again.

item.title: Roleplayers
item.description:
Roleplaying Rules

ABSOLUTELY no AFK macroing! No exceptions! If spoken to by Staff, you MUST respond.

Members must always remain “in character” at all times. There are plenty of other ways to communicate “Out of Character” by using Discord, .msg etc… If you really must use an out of character message use the [OoC] tag. Only do this if it’s absolutely necessary.

A Bio or Background story must be submitted and is subject to review by Staff before being accepted into the RPer Guild. Think this through carefully as this is the character you will be playing, although it’s expected that your character will grow and evolve as time goes on. It’s not required that you use “Thee and “Thou” unless this is part of your character’s story.

item.title: Vanity Shop
item.description:
You will be able to find Omega Tokens in the loot or as quest rewards. You will use these as currency to purchase items in the Vanity Shop

Item Details Cost
Runic Dye Tub This item will allow you to dye your Runebooks. It has 3 charges. 10
Omega Dye This item will allow you to dye your items. It has 3 charges. 20
Soul Pen This item will allow you to write your name on your items. It has 3 charges. 20
Bear Crystal This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Beetle Egg This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Raptalon Scale This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Ki-Rin Lantern This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Wolf Diamond This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Hai Riyo Coin This is a special mount that you will be able to re-summon after it dies by double clicking the item. 35
Two-Story Brick House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 15
Two-Story Brick Villa Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 20
Two-Story Large Log Cabin Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 40
Two-Story Plaster Manor Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 38
Two-Story Thatched Manor Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 50
Four-Story Stone and Plaster House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 20
Three-Story Stone House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 25
Large Stone Manor Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 80
Four-Story Stone House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 25
Three-Story Double House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 45
Three-Story Villa Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 35
Three-Story Stone Villa Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 50
Marble Tower Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 55
Three-Story Large Plaster Manor Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 55
Three-Story Oriental House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 35
Medium Tower Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 25
Square Plaster House Vanity shop exclusive house: See the houses section for details. 60

item.title: Commands
item.description:
Commands

Command Information
.arm Will bring up an arm gump to select weapons you wish to save to different arm slots, can then be used like “.arm 1-10” to arm different saved options. You can also select a bag you wish to disarm to and toggle auto disarm before arming.
.autoloop XXXX .autoloop will bring up a gump to select how many loops you want to do in any crafting or gathering type skill, can also be used like “.autoloop xxxx” where xxxx is a number between 0-9999.
.c “.c” brings up chat options for guild chat. “.c xxx” writes a message in guild chat with your current .c options.
.ca “.ca xxx” writes a chat message to your allied guild chat.
.co “.co xxx” writes a chat message to your own guild chat.
.cast .cast works for earth, necro, holy and song books. .cast is used as following “.cast set 1-50” to set a spell you want to save on that slot. “.cast 1-50” to cast the spell you saved on that slot and “.cast reset” to reset the saved spells.
.chat “.chat text” will allow you to chat with the rest of the shard. To turn off chat simply write “.chat off” and to turn it back on “.chat on”.
.clearmsglog This command will clear your .msg log that appears when you type “.msg”.
.commands Will bring up a list of all the commands you can use.
.consider Shows how many innocent kills you have on your record.
.count Counts the number of items in a targeted container.
.disarm This disarms the currently equipped weapons in your hands, if you want it to disarm the weapons to a certain bag type “.disarm bag” and target the bag you want to use instead.
.dropskills Brings up a gump that lets you drop skills to 0, use with caution since there is no going back if mistakes are made. need to be undressed and unmounted to use this command
.email Another way of messaging people, can even message offline people.
.fame Displays your current fame and karma.
.gateprompt Will toggle if you want gates to prompt yes/no before entering. Off by default.
.guards Will call guards in guarded cities to help protect you against evil foes.
.guilds Brings up the guild menu.
.hairshop Brings up the hairshop menu, can only be used in the hairshop. You can find a gate to the hairshop outside of Ocllo bank.
.hungry Shows your current hunger level.
.infovault Brings up the infovault website.
.msg Brings up a msg gump where you can private msg players that are online.
.move Moves all carried items of the same kind as the selected item to the selected bag.
.online Brings up a list of all currently online players showing their names and age. Age is only updated on logoff
.pagans Shows a gump with all the pagan reagents in your backpack.
.password Allows you to change your password for you ultima online account. not for the website
.ph Shows what power hour is active.
.prots Show you all your current protection levels equipped.
.reags Shows a gump with all the reagents in your backpack.
.recalltotem Tells your totem to recall to you, can only be used once a day.
.redeed Redeeds the target back to its original deed, can only be used on items in houses that you own or co-own.
.removejewels Will undress you currently equipped jewelery.
.reply .reply replies to your latest .msg from another player.
.servertime Shows the current time of the server.
.setemail Allow you to an email that are linked to your account, this cannot be changed and are used for password recovery.
.showcaps Shows your skills and stats caps.
.showclasse Will show your current class and level.
.skills Brings up a menu that allows you to control the skill arrows (lock, lower, higher) and see % class.
.suicide This command kills yourself, can be useful if you are stuck somewhere you can’t use the unstuck function in help menu with.
.trashlb Brings up the trash leaderboard.
.togglebuildmark Will toggle the “Yes/No” popup on/off when crafting items.
.togglediff Will toggle the difficulty messages on/off when using skills.
.where Will show your current location. Useful when paging about a location problem so staff can find the location you are talking about.
.whereboat Will give you the location of your boat. UO Automap can be used to find the boat.
.wheretotem Will give you the location of your totem. UO Automap can be used to find the totem.

item.title: Houses
item.description:
Houses

Certain houses can only be acquired by visiting the Vanity NPC in Ocllo. You will need a special currency that can only be found in loot to purchase them.

Image Type Number of lockdowns Number of secure chests Number of teleporters Price
Blue Tent 30 1 0 60000
Green Tent 30 1 0 60000
Small Stone and Plaster House 100 1 0 100000
Small Stone House 100 1 0 100000
Small Plaster House 100 1 0 100000
Small Wood and Straw House 100 1 0 100000
Small Stone Workshop 300 3 0 125000
Small Marble Workshop 300 3 0 125000
Sandstone Patio House 500 5 0 150000
Two-Story Log Cabin 500 5 0 350000
Small Tower 600 6 0 400000
Large Brick House 400 4 0 750000
Large Patio House 600 6 0 850000
(Has a Trough) Ranch Patio House 400 4 0 850000
Two-Story Villa 600 6 0 900000
Two-Story Wood/Plaster House 600 6 0 1250000
Two-Story Stone/Plaster House 600 6 0 1250000
Large Marble Patio House 800 8 0 1750000
Large Tower 1200 12 5 3500000
Keep 1800 18 10 6000000
Grand Castle 2500 25 10 9000000
Two-Story Brick House 300 3 0 Vanity Shop
Two-Story Brick Villa 600 6 0 Vanity Shop
Two-Story Large Log Cabin 1200 12 5 Vanity Shop
Two-Story Plaster Manor 1100 11 4 Vanity Shop
Two-Story Thatched Manor 1400 14 6 Vanity Shop
Four-Story Stone and Plaster House 600 6 1 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Stone House 700 7 0 Vanity Shop
Large Stone Manor 2200 22 8 Vanity Shop
Four-Story Stone House 600 6 0 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Double House 1000 10 4 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Villa 800 8 0 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Stone Villa 1100 11 2 Vanity Shop
Marble Tower 1200 12 5 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Large Plaster Manor 1100 11 4 Vanity Shop
Three-Story Oriental House 800 8 2 Vanity Shop
Medium Tower 600 6 0 Vanity Shop
Square Plaster House 1300 13 2 Vanity Shop

item.title: Repair & Refinement
item.description:
How does repair & refinement work?

You will need to make sure you’ve got these things:

1 : a retort tool (can be bought from the vanity shop)

2 : required reagents (see the table below)

Repairing:

To repair an item without the help from a Crafter, you will need to apply mending oil.

Mending Oil will take on the quality of the material used and use it to repair any piece of equipment.
